title: Monorepo layout with no aggregate targets (test-all / lint-all / build-all missing)
makefile_snippet:
# Project has multiple go.mod files: ./services/api/go.mod and ./services/worker/go.mod
test:
	go test -race ./...
lint:
	golangci-lint run
build-api:
	go build -o bin/api ./services/api/cmd/api
context: Multiple go.mod files detected — monorepo layout. The Makefile only has single-module targets; no aggregate test-all / lint-all / build-all targets that iterate over all modules.
expected_feedback: monorepo detected: add test-all, lint-all, build-all aggregate targets that loop over each module
